summary: Script is excellent: type-hinted, uses dataclasses, comprehensive error handling, clear docstrings. Workflow has good structure (pinned actions, least-privilege permissions, sensible triggers) but critical gaps: (1) references non-existent fixture files (fixtures/run1-3/); (2) aggregator command duplicated (lines 38-39, 42-45) without explanation; (3) no test harness to run 'act push' and validate output as required; (4) pytest tests/ assumed but not provided; (5) workflow steps don't fail on Python errors. Missing: sample JUnit/JSON fixture files, act validation harness, test files. As-is, workflow cannot run.
